retry_reason: Unconditional put; after the call the caller must not use the object and retrying would be a double-put.
contract_summary: Release wrapper: decrements the reference count on a bpf_cpumask. If the count reaches zero, the object is freed via RCU. The caller must hold a valid reference and must not access the object after this call. This function does not return a success/failure indicator; the release always succeeds in dropping a reference. The caller is responsible for ensuring that no further operations on the object occur after the last put.
